message:
fix: prevent integer overflow in ByteRange::len and remove allocation in host matching

- ByteRange::len() now uses saturating arithmetic to prevent overflow when
  end is near u64::MAX
- host_matches_pattern() wildcard check avoids format!() allocation by
  using direct suffix + dot-boundary check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
